commands.review_summary:
The PR removes sender-owner tool visibility gating, owner-only tool descriptors, and system-event owner-downgrade plumbing across gateway, agent tools, bundled plugins, docs, tests, security scan rules, and changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings by source inspection: the diff removes the direct owner-only filter and the system-event metadata that current command/run paths consume to downgrade sender ownership. I did not run tests because this review is explicitly read-only.
commands.review_followup: Protected security/maintainer labels and the deliberate trust-model change require human security/product review rather than an automated cleanup or repair lane.
